title: delosperma crassum
intro: Delosperma crassum, also known as Yellow Ball, is a type of flowering succulent plant native to southern Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Delosperma crassum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. Delosperma crassum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
